notes: Preview-only markets — not on-chain yet. Used for the everyday Crypto + Sports sections so the catalogue isn't 100% astronomy.

markets.title: Bitcoin price ≥ $100,000 USD on May 31, 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Bitcoin close above $100K by end of May?
markets.resolution_source: CoinGecko BTC/USD daily close on May 31, 2026.
markets.YES_condition: CoinGecko reports BTC/USD daily close ≥ 100,000 on 2026-05-31.
markets.why_interesting: BTC has been bouncing around the $100K psychological level all spring. The May close is what every trader is watching.
markets.ui_description: Bitcoin's daily close on the last day of May 2026, measured against the $100,000 line. Resolves off CoinGecko's USD price feed.

markets.title: Solana price ≥ $300 USD before July 1, 2026
markets.resolution_source: CoinGecko SOL/USD intraday high between 2026-04-27 and 2026-06-30.
markets.YES_condition: CoinGecko reports SOL/USD intraday high ≥ 300 at any point between 2026-04-27 and 2026-06-30.
markets.why_interesting: Solana cleared $250 in March and stalled. Retesting $300 is the next leg up — or a rejection.
markets.ui_description: Tracks Solana's USD price against $300 across May and June. A single tag is enough — does not need to close above.

markets.title: Ethereum market cap > Bitcoin's at any point before 2027
markets.simple_title: Will Ethereum overtake Bitcoin in market cap?
markets.resolution_source: CoinGecko market cap snapshot any time before 2027-01-01.
markets.YES_condition: CoinGecko ETH market cap exceeds BTC market cap at any 5-minute snapshot before 2027-01-01.
markets.why_interesting: The flippening — when ETH overtakes BTC — has been crypto's white whale for half a decade. The 2026 ratio is the closest it's been since 2017.
markets.ui_description: A long-tail YES market. Resolves YES if ETH's market cap ever exceeds BTC's between today and end of 2026.

markets.title: Stablecoin daily volume on Solana > $5B before October 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Solana stablecoin volume hit $5B in a day?
markets.resolution_source: Artemis or DefiLlama stablecoin transfer volume on Solana, daily.
markets.YES_condition: Daily on-chain stablecoin transfer volume on Solana ≥ $5,000,000,000 on any single day before 2026-10-01.
markets.why_interesting: Solana stablecoin volume crossed $3B in March 2026. $5B in a single day would mark a new payments-rail milestone.
markets.ui_description: A growth metric for Solana as payments infrastructure. Tracks the highest single-day stablecoin transfer volume across all Solana stablecoins.

markets.title: Real Madrid wins UEFA Champions League 2025/26 final
markets.simple_title: Will Real Madrid win the Champions League?
markets.resolution_source: UEFA official result for the 2026 Champions League final on 2026-05-30.
markets.YES_condition: UEFA records Real Madrid as the winner of the 2025/26 UEFA Champions League final played on 2026-05-30.
markets.why_interesting: Real Madrid is back in another final after winning in 2024 and reaching the semis in 2025. The final is May 30 in Munich.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the night of the 2026 UCL final. YES if Real Madrid lifts the trophy, NO otherwise.

markets.title: Boston Celtics win NBA Finals 2026
markets.simple_title: Will the Celtics win the NBA Finals?
markets.resolution_source: NBA official result for the 2026 NBA Finals.
markets.YES_condition: NBA records the Boston Celtics as the 2025/26 NBA Champions on or before 2026-06-25.
markets.why_interesting: Reigning champs from 2024, made it back to the conference finals in 2025. The 2026 run is their last shot before payroll forces a roster shake-up.
markets.ui_description: Resolves on the night of NBA Finals Game 7 (or whenever a team clinches). YES if Boston wins the championship, NO otherwise.

markets.title: USA national team reaches the 2026 World Cup quarterfinal
markets.simple_title: Will the USA reach the World Cup quarterfinals?
markets.resolution_source: FIFA bracket for the 2026 FIFA World Cup hosted by USA, Canada, Mexico.
markets.YES_condition: FIFA records the USA Men's National Team as advancing past the round of 16 to reach the quarterfinal of the 2026 World Cup.
markets.why_interesting: Home tournament, deepest USMNT roster in a decade. Quarters has been the USA's ceiling since 2002.
markets.ui_description: The 2026 World Cup is hosted across the USA, Canada, and Mexico. This market tracks whether the USA Men's National Team reaches the final 8.

markets.title: Max Verstappen wins F1 Drivers' Championship 2026
markets.simple_title: Will Verstappen win the F1 Championship again?
markets.resolution_source: FIA official 2026 F1 season standings after the final race in Abu Dhabi.
markets.YES_condition: FIA records Max Verstappen as the 2026 Formula 1 World Drivers' Champion after the final race on 2026-12-06.
markets.why_interesting: 2026 brings major regulation changes — new power units, new aero. Verstappen's dynasty is either continuing or ending here.
markets.ui_description: Resolves after the final race of the 2026 F1 season in Abu Dhabi (December 6). YES if Verstappen is the champion, NO if anyone else takes the crown.
